name: papers
description: Papers document workflows for Codex and other MCP-capable clients.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Papers documents, shares, and attachments
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the Papers document platform through the bundled MCP server. Manage documents, folders, shares, and attachments with your Papers API token.
